goal: Review the fourth-round community-module fixes claimed by another AI and identify any remaining bugs, regressions, incomplete implementations, or misleading completion claims so the user can direct follow-up work precisely.
constraints: Do not modify runtime code in this task; this is a review-only task.
Focus on the updated community-module files and any directly related storage/navigation behavior.
Verify claimed fixes against the actual code rather than the other AI summary.
Prioritize behavioral correctness over compile/lint status.
deliverables: A concise code-review report with prioritized findings and actionable follow-up items.
